scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/types && npm run build -w packages/schemas && npm run build -w packages/utils && npm run build -w apps/portal && npm run build -w apps/admin && npm run build -w apps/dev && npm run build -w apps/api
scripts.build:portal: npm run build -w packages/types && npm run build -w packages/schemas && npm run build -w packages/utils && npm run build -w apps/portal
scripts.build:admin: npm run build -w packages/types && npm run build -w packages/schemas && npm run build -w packages/utils && npm run build -w apps/admin
scripts.build:dev: npm run build -w packages/types && npm run build -w packages/schemas && npm run build -w packages/utils && npm run build -w apps/dev
